EmailTemplate.description: Customer has not accepted the Close Brother commission consent. This is the email to provide 30 days notice of cancellation if payment hasn't been made.
EmailTemplate.name: CDC Cancelled 1
EmailTemplate.subject: Your insurance policy is scheduled for cancellation
EmailTemplate.textOnly:
Hi {!Contact.FirstName},
You elected to pay for your Kingsbridge business insurance policy {!Policy__c.Name} through direct debit payments.
Our credit providers Close Brothers Premium Finance required you to consent to the commission Kingsbridge receive in order to provide the loan for your insurance policy.
Close Brothers have sent you numerous communications via email, SMS and physical letter to notify you of this requirement.
You have not provided this consent/You have declined to consent and so Close Brothers have now rejected your credit application. This means the payment for your insurance policy remains outstanding.
What are your options?
- Make your outstanding payment in full to Kingsbridge You can make a payment by credit or debit card. We also accept cardless payments via GoCardless. To make your payment please contact our customer service team on 01242 808740 and select option 3.
- Re-apply for a loan with Close Brothers If you are happy to provide commission consent, it may be possible to apply for a new loan with Close Brothers to cover your outstanding payment. To re-apply for a loan with Close Brothers please contact our customer service team on 01242 808740 and select option 3.
What happens if I don’t make the payment?
If a payment has not been made before [proposed cancellation date], your policy will be cancelled from inception.
Please be aware, if the policy is cancelled from inception, your business will not be insured and you will not be able to make a claim under it as it will be considered null and void.
To help your business stay protected, please call us on 01242 808740 to make a payment or discuss further.
Please note, for data security reasons, do not send credit or debit card details to us via email.
Kind regards,
{!User.FirstName} Customer Service Team
E: customersupport@kingsbridge.co.uk T: 01242 808 740
